ex_en: The children play in the garden.
Bring me a glass of water.
The book lies on the table.

ex_lb: Do ass een un der Dier.
ex_en: There is someone at the door.

ex_lb: Ech wëll, mä ech kann net.
ex_en: I want to, but I can't.

ex_lb: Ech bleiwen doheem, well et reent.
ex_en: I stay home because it rains.

ex_lb: Ech weess, datt du do bass.
ex_en: I know that you are there.

ex_lb: Wann et reent, bleiwen ech doheem.
ex_en: If it rains, I stay home.

ex_lb: Ech weess net, ob hie kënnt.
ex_en: I don't know whether he comes.
The book is on the table.
The cat is under the bed.
I wait in front of the door.

ex_lb: De Gaart ass hannert dem Haus.
ex_en: The garden is behind the house.

ex_lb: No der Schoul gi mer heem.

ex_en: Because of the weather we stay.
We are four in the team.
At eighteen one is an adult.
The town has a thousand inhabitants.
On the third day it rains.
I rarely go to the cinema.
The bakery is on the right.
I have a lot to do.

ex_lb: Et ass ganz schéin kal haut.
Et reent an et ass och nach kal.
ex_en: It rains and it is cold as well.

ex_lb: Et reent, dofir bleiwen ech doheem.
ex_en: It rains, therefore I stay home.

ex_lb: Mir iessen an dann nach een Téi.
ex_en: We eat and then have a tea.
The children run across the meadow.
Put the glass on the table.
Lay the book on the floor.
In the morning I drink coffee.
In the evening I watch TV.
At noon we eat a warm meal.
The day after tomorrow we are off.
How often do you go there?
